rag_rules: Place generated AGREE annex blocks in the target component implementation scope after subcomponents and connections
Use only visible identifiers from the target component or its type
Preserve existing AADL architecture by not modifying component types or implementations beyond annex insertion
Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts
generic_rules: Insert annex blocks in the most specific valid scope for the contract
Use only identifiers visible in the target scope
Preserve existing architecture by not modifying non-annex content
Place implementation-level bindings in implementation annexes
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use AGREE scalar types: int, real, and bool
Use exact Boolean expressions only when the port is an AGREE bool in scope
anti_patterns: Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
Do not convert Boolean domain values into integers
Do not modify non-annex content of the target component or implementation
irrelevant_topics: AGREE, annex, assume, guarantee, assign, validator, or repair
